const t = ALL_TOOLS.find(x=>x.name==="mcp__courtlistener__search"); if(!t){text("missing");exit();} const fn=tools.mcp__courtlistener__search; const r=await fn({type:"o",q:"Monell \"contracting out\" medical care final policymaking authority county",filed_before:"2026-07-17",num_results:10,fields:["caseName","court_citation_string","dateFiled","citation","absolute_url","snippet"]}); for (const c of (r?.content||[])) c.type==="image"?image(c):text(c.text||JSON.stringify(c));
